name: Recombee
description: Recombee — Recommendation engine API using collaborative filtering and content-based algorithms for personalization.

seo.title: Recombee — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Recombee: Recombee — Recommendation engine API using collaborative filtering and content-based algorithms for personalization.

when_to_use: Collaborative filtering recommendations for media streaming
Content-based personalization for news article feed
E-commerce product recommendations via REST API
User-item matrix for recommendation engine integration
Real-time recommendation updates based on session behavior

pros: Fast setup; usable recommendations within days
Combines collaborative filtering with content-based models
A/B testing and segment controls built in
Fair pricing for mid-sized catalogs and traffic
cons: Less control over model internals than custom ML
Cold-start performance requires careful item metadata
Dashboard depth trails enterprise personalization suites
review.verdict: Pragmatic recommendations-as-a-service for teams that want results without hiring an ML team, with real tuning headroom.
review.best_for: E-commerce, media, and content sites needing recs without in-house ML engineers.
review.not_for: Teams needing deep model control or sub-50ms hyper-personalization at scale.
